content:
<action>
<tool>graph.plan</tool>
<objective>Create a long novel with detailed settings</objective>
<steps>
1. Brainstorm core themes, genre, and setting details.
2. Develop characters and their motivations.
3. Outline the plot structure (beginning, middle, end).
4. Create a detailed world-building document (settings, magic/tech, history).
5. Draft the first chapter.
6. Verify the structure and content against the plan.
</steps>
<reason>The owner task requires a structured approach to ensure depth and consistency in a long novel.</reason>
<checks>Plan is comprehensive and covers setting and character development.</checks>
<paths>stories/long-novel-with-detailed-settings</paths>
</action>
